/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/framework.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/framework.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/framework.dir/src/FeedForward.cpp.o CMakeFiles/framework.dir/src/Layer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/framework.dir/src/KatyushaLayer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/framework.dir/src/Functions.cpp.o CMakeFiles/framework.dir/src/DataLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/framework.dir/src/Matrix.cpp.o -o framework  /home/darsh/Downloads/boost_1_70_0/stage/lib/libboost_iostreams.a /home/darsh/Downloads/boost_1_70_0/stage/lib/libboost_filesystem.a /home/darsh/Downloads/boost_1_70_0/stage/lib/libboost_system.a /usr/lib/libpython3.13.so /home/darsh/Downloads/boost_1_70_0/stage/lib/libboost_regex.a /usr/lib/libpython3.13.so
